torch_pattern:
torch_padding = []
for dimension in reversed(padding):
    torch_padding.append(dimension[0])
    torch_padding.append(dimension[1])
torch.nn.functional.pad(input_tensor, pad=torch_padding, mode="constant", value=value)

config_template.padding: [(0, 0)] * {RANK}; padding[{DIM}] = ({PAD_BEFORE}, {PAD_AFTER})  # per-dim (before, after) pairs ordered outermost->innermost; rank <= 4
config_template.value: {PAD_VALUE}  # 0.0 for activations/seq-len padding; -inf / -1e30 when feeding topk/softmax; 1.0 for rot-mat cos pad

weight_transform: torch pad list is the per-dim (before, after) pairs reversed (innermost dim first) and flattened: torch_pad = [b,a for (b,a) in reversed(ttnn_padding)]. No weight tensors involved; when padding conv weights/bias for channel alignment, out_channels padded to next multiple of 32 with zeros.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: NCHW conv-preprocessing activation, channel pad C->min_channels (e.g. 3->16), row-major
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.pad(activation_pyt_padded, padding=padding, value=0, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) on ROW_MAJOR L1 input, followed by transpose/reshape chain

placement_observations.size_descriptor: conv activation (N, H, W, C) padded along H/C, large spatial extent spanning full 8x8 grid
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.pad(tt_input_tensor, padding=((0, C-c), (pad_h, pad_h_right), (0, 0)), value=0, memory_config=pad_sharded_memory_config)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: variable-length sequence tensor padded up to a multiple (tile/chunk alignment), potentially large seq_len
placement_observations.source: model util pad_to_multiple: x = ttnn.to_memory_config(x, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); ttnn.pad(x, padding, value=value, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention mask [B, 1, q_len, k_len] padded on last two dims to tile-aligned q_length/k_length
placement_observations.source: model call site: mask_rm = ttnn.pad(mask_rm, padding, value=float(mask_value), memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); then to_layout(TILE_LAYOUT)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: 5D conv3d activation reshaped to 4D (N, T, H*W, C), symmetric z-padding on dim 1
placement_observations.source: model call site: ttnn.pad(x0, [(0,0),(padding_z,padding_z),(0,0),(0,0)], 0, use_multicore=True, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: pre-reduce-scatter hidden-state tensor, last-dim performance padding; only applied when penultimate dim is tile-height or larger
placement_observations.source: model call site: if pad_size and tensor.shape[-2] >= 32: tensor_padded = ttnn.pad(tensor, [(0,0),(0,0),(0,0),(0,pad_size)], 0) before ttnn.experimental.reduce_scatter_minimal_async (memory_config = memory_config or ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small NHWC image tensor, channel pad to CONV2D_MIN_CHANNEL_SIZE or next multiple of 32, performed before to_device
placement_observations.source: segformer call site: ttnn_input_tensor = ttnn.pad(ttnn_input_tensor, padded_shape, [0,0,0,0], 0); ttnn.to_device(ttnn_input_tensor, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode logits [1, 1, batch, vocab], batch padded up to 32 for sampling; small batch regime
placement_observations.source: model call site: if batch_dim < 32: logits = ttnn.pad(logits, padding=[(0,0),(0,0),(0, 32 - batch_dim),(0,0)], value=0.0) before sampling.sample

placement_observations.size_descriptor: topk scores last-dim pad to TOPK_MIN_WIDTH (e.g. 64) or 8192 vocab bucket, padded with -inf so padding never wins topk
placement_observations.source: model call site: expert_scores_grouped = ttnn.pad(expert_scores_grouped, [(0,0),(0,0),(0,0),(0, TOPK_MIN_WIDTH - shape[3])], value=-float("inf")) before ttnn.topk; similar vocab<8192 pad with value=-1e30 to enable multicore topk
